close_reason: Implemented worker availability check per QuiCK Algorithm 1 line 5. Scanner now accepts worker_pool and concurrency options, and skips scanning when all workers are busy.
description:
**QuiCK Paper Reference:** Algorithm 1, line 5: `wait until at least one worker has no task to process`

**Current Behavior:**
Scanner fires on a fixed interval regardless of worker availability. May accumulate pending_queues in Manager when workers are busy.

**Expected Behavior (per QuiCK):**
Scanner should only scan when there are available workers to process the results.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/consumer/scanner.ex`
- `apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/consumer/manager.ex` (expose worker availability)

**Risk:** Low - Optimization to reduce wasted scans
title: Scanner should wait for available workers before scanning
